user_system_path: Issue #226 is the active rung 6 seam — owner-path readiness: sign-in + Slack self-loop. Slice 1 (owner-landing honesty, app/dashboard/page.tsx) merged via PR #229. This slice (slice 2) authorizes the sign-in reliability repair named by the issue and the PR #229 receipt: lib/auth/auth-options.ts + lib/auth/supabase-auth-user.ts + their focused tests, so a transient Supabase blip can no longer hard-fail the owner's sign-in. Rung 5 (issue #220) is COMPLETE. Rung 7 (non-owner paid loop) is forbidden until #226 is proven. Issue #178 remains suspended/queued.
no_routing_contract: The Agent must read ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md, FOLDERA_BUILD_ORDER.yaml, .foldera-contract.json, and docs/SOURCE_OF_TRUTH_MAP.md before acting, and must follow the active issue exactly. The Agent may not ask Brandon to route, repeat, or arbitrate the queue.

terminal_state_authority.merge_through_rule: Merge-through is allowed only after local proof, GitHub checks green, forbidden work touched is NO, and the PR receipt records the source-truth closeout and terminal state.

allowed_files_raw: Active seam: issue #226 owner-path readiness, slice 2 (sign-in reliability). Source-truth/governance files: ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md, FOLDERA_BUILD_ORDER.yaml, .foldera-contract.json, docs/SOURCE_OF_TRUTH_MAP.md, scripts/source-truth-check.ts, scripts/continuity-gate.ts, focused gate tests. PLUS the sign-in reliability files named by issue #226 diagnostics: lib/auth/auth-options.ts, lib/auth/supabase-auth-user.ts, lib/auth/__tests__/**. No other implementation files.
forbidden_files_raw: Only the sign-in reliability files (lib/auth/auth-options.ts, lib/auth/supabase-auth-user.ts, lib/auth/__tests__/**) are authorized in this slice. Still forbidden: live Slack rails, auth route handlers (app/api/auth/**), token-store/subscription rewrites, Supabase schema, Stripe/billing, package changes, components/**, dashboard files, nav architecture, winner/brain wiring, queue activation, non-owner loop / rung 7, and broad cleanup.
required_browser_proof: Owner (Brandon) signs in with Gmail and lands on /dashboard with a session that has a real user id. Deterministic unit proof covers the two hard-fail classes (token persist throw, duplicate-user create dead-end); live owner sign-in confirmation remains the rung 6 completion criterion.
acceptance_condition: Source-truth files agree issue #226 is the active rung 6 seam; initial sign-in no longer hard-fails when user_tokens persist throws transiently (one retry, then degraded TokenPersistError session instead of lockout); resolveSupabaseAuthUserId recovers an existing user when createUser reports already-registered after transient lookup failures; focused auth tests prove both behaviors; all gate commands pass.
stop_condition: Stop when this sign-in reliability PR is open with a GitHub receipt on issue #226. Live owner sign-in proof and the Slack self-loop receipt remain on issue #226 for the next authorized slice.
browser_proof_command: manual/live: owner signs in with Gmail at https://foldera.ai/login -> lands on /dashboard with session.user.id set; Vercel runtime logs show no [auth][jwt] FATAL during the sign-in
